narratives.Description: Port scripts/pr_check_closing_keywords.py -- the check that inspects a PR body for issue-closing keywords (Closes #N / Fixes #N) and reports which issues it would close -- to TypeScript over Node execFile UTF-8-safe capture, reusing @deftai/core/scm gh helpers. It is independently buildable as a self-contained packages/core/src/pr-closing-keywords module with a golden parity binary.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Create the packages/core/src/pr-closing-keywords module porting the closing-keyword scan and the reported issue list over Node execFile UTF-8-safe capture, reusing @deftai/core/scm, with vitest unit tests in the module directory.
2. Add packages/cli/src/pr-closing-keywords.ts exposing the TS check behind the CLI seam.
3. Add packages/cli/src/pr-closing-keywords-parity.ts that runs the TS path and the Python scripts/pr_check_closing_keywords.py oracle and asserts byte-identical output with cache off.
narratives.UserStory: As a directive maintainer, I want the closing-keyword check available in TypeScript, so that the set of issues a PR would close is reported on the TS engine with the same output as the Python module.

narrative.Acceptance: Running the TS closing-keyword check against a PR body with Closes/Fixes keywords returns the same set of referenced issue numbers the Python pr_check_closing_keywords.py module returns.
Running the TS check against a PR body with no closing keywords returns the same empty result the Python module returns.
Running the pr-closing-keywords-parity binary returns exit 0 and renders byte-identical output to the Python scripts/pr_check_closing_keywords.py oracle with cache off.

expected_outputs: New packages/core/src/pr-closing-keywords module with vitest unit tests
Byte-identical parity vs scripts/pr_check_closing_keywords.py under cache-off
swarm.missing_traces_justification: #1530 Wave-4b framework-internal TS port traced to GitHub issue #1730 and umbrella epic #1530; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies to maintainer tooling.

references.title: Issue #1730: feat(ts-migration): port pr_* monitors + cascade automation to TS (Wave 4)
